angle: Investor-led: track-record-as-thesis -> fund-manager weight (Nick Carter, endorsement only)
hook_type: One verified number ($234M+) as a complete sentence, full stop, curiosity turn into the fund-manager quote
tactic: Number-then-turn hook -> verbatim Carter fund-manager endorsement -> the next offer is our own -> waitlist
primary_text:
$234M+ raised on this platform. Now hear why a fund manager rates it.

"Equity crowdfunding is core fintech infrastructure, the rails that let everyday Australians invest in the businesses they believe in, and Birchal has built the dominant platform in the category."

Nick Carter, Triple Bubble.

The next offer on the platform is our own. You read it the day it goes live, then you decide.

Leave your email and we will tell you the moment the offer goes live.

*Always consider the general CSF risk warning and offer document before investing.
headline: $234M+ raised, and a fund manager explains
description: $234M+ raised. A fund manager explains why. Leave your email.
_source_label: DRC V5c -- INV2 Investor-led / fund-manager weight (Carter, endorsement only)
_iterates: BIRCHAL-V5-W set (waitlist regime). New V5c structure: 4 angles x 4 hook-distinct variants under learnings-meta-ad.md #5 + Generation prompt addendum (one idea per sentence, ONE number then a turn, reader is subject at the turn and CTA, literal email micro-action CTA per WAITLIST-CTA 2026-05-18).
_v5c_rationale: One of 4 hook-distinct variants in its angle; the hook (first 1-2 sentences) is the primary differentiator, body adapted to fit the hook (JB-permitted 2026-05-18).

Built to the learnings-meta-ad.md #5 / Generation prompt addendum 8 structural gates: opens with ONE verified number (or Caples Why on a verified number) as a complete sentence, full stop, then a turn; the reader is the grammatical subject at the turn and the CTA; no third-party company names in the bridge; plain concrete nouns; one proof point per beat; CTA = literal email micro-action with the exchange; verbatim CSF warning byte-exact terminator.

CTA field is the WAITLIST-CTA approved verbatim 'Save my spot' (landing-page canonical button); the in-copy close uses the 2026-05-18 JB-preferred literal email micro-action 'Leave your email and we will tell you the moment the offer goes live' (FMTH top-performer pattern, CSF-clean notification framing).
Strict WAITLIST regime: Birchal's own CSF offer is not live until 26 June 2026 (OFFER-CONTEXT). No transaction verbs, no $ minimum, no preferential-terms framing. Pre-offer compliant.
_drc_audience: B2C considered, most-aware. Sophisticated reader who weights fund-manager validation; track record is the thesis.
_compliance_findings_resolved: Gate #1: opens with ONE verified number ($234M+) as a complete sentence, full stop, then a turn. No comma-spliced stat triplet.
PREOFFER-VERBS: 'Leave your email', 'we will tell you the moment', 'read'. No transaction verbs. 'rates it' is endorsement framing about the fund manager, not a reader CTA.
VERBATIM-OFFER-LANGUAGE: 'we will tell you the moment the offer goes live'. No 'we will send'.
VERBATIM-CSF-WARNING: byte-exact final line, appears exactly once.
QUOTE-002: Nick Carter pasted verbatim (em-dashes already converted to commas in facts.json store), attributed 'Nick Carter, Triple Bubble'.

INVESTOR-ASSOCIATION: 'dominant platform in the category' is Carter's verbatim endorsement (QUOTE-002), not a Birchal-issued market-share/#1 claim and not an investment claim. PLAT-005 NOT used here (single market-share statement reserved for DOM angle).
Subject discipline: one 'Birchal' inside the attributed Carter quote (exempt); first-person we/our otherwise.
Number traceability: $234M+=PLAT-002. No unsourced market-share / #1 / first / valuation.
